body:
- A couple of leftovers from the previous PR. 

- Removing the wrapping of parameter structs into tuples for CloudMicrophysics parameters in aerosol activation. We still have to do it for Atmos-defined prescribed aerosol parameters. This is not worth fixing, because it will become a non-issue after Dennis is done with his parameters PR 

Next item on the list of https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/4285
title: 2M aerosol activation fixes

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
- Fix mixing length computations;
- Use two Picard iterations and the Aitken acceleration method to compute cloud fraction, buoyancy gradient and mixing_length that have a circular dependency.

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

title: smooth mixing length
